title: Department Manager Vacancy at Zara India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Zara India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zara India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zara India:
Zara India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India!
